violations.description: Automate E2E suite disables parallelization using serial mode.
violations.suggestion: Run in parallel and isolate only order-dependent scenarios.

violations.description: Automate API suite also enforces serial mode without demonstrated state coupling.
violations.suggestion: Remove serial mode to reduce wall-clock CI time.

violations.description: Each scenario performs full login + multi-page navigation, increasing runtime overhead.
violations.suggestion: Use storageState/session fixture and focused setup utilities per test intent.

violations.description: Viewport loop replays full navigation flow three times in one test, increasing test duration.
violations.suggestion: Split per-breakpoint checks into parametrized tests for parallel workers.

recommendations: Remove serial mode from automate suites
Parameterize viewport checks into parallel test cases
Reduce repeated setup with authenticated session fixtures
summary: Performance is acceptable but constrained by serial execution and repeated setup/navigation patterns.
